main_files_or_products: DESIVAST_BGS_VOLLIM_VoidFinder_NGC.fits; DESIVAST_BGS_VOLLIM_VoidFinder_SGC.fits; DESIVAST_BGS_VOLLIM_V2_VIDE_NGC.fits; DESIVAST_BGS_VOLLIM_V2_VIDE_SGC.fits; DESIVAST_BGS_VOLLIM_V2_REVOLVER_NGC.fits; DESIVAST_BGS_VOLLIM_V2_REVOLVER_SGC.fits
mass_info_available_directly: No direct mass column in void catalog itself
notes: Best primary starting point because it offers multiple void-finder algorithms on a common DESI Y1 BGS Bright base

dataset_name: Stellar Mass and Emission Line Catalog (DESI DR1)
notes: DESI recommends MASS_CG from CIGALE as the stellar-mass field

volume_info_available: Indirectly via positions/redshifts, not a void-volume field
notes: Good secondary support layer rather than the first dataset to start from

dataset_name: SDSS DR7 VoidFinder Catalog (Pan et al. 2012)
provider: SDSS DR7 / Pan et al. public void catalog
main_files_or_products: Public VoidFinder void and void-galaxy catalog products described in Pan et al. 2012
notes: Strong literature anchor, but less convenient than DESI DR1 for unified mass-plus-void workflow

dataset_name: SDSS DR7 Watershed/ZOBOV-based Public Void Catalog (Sutter et al. 2012; Nadathur & Hotchkiss 2014 lineage)
main_files_or_products: Catalog products described in Sutter et al. 2012 and later public watershed-based SDSS DR7 releases
notes: Recommended only after the primary DESI DR1 pipeline is stable
